'''Argoon''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Argoon system/Legends|Argoon system]], near [[Pakuuni/Legends|Pakuuni]]. It was the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] manufacturing facility abandoned after numerous [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attacks.

{{Planet-stub}}
